message:
Command `
# DRT2 (step 71) is at 30000 groups and progressing.
# Python drainer is working well but might still get behind.
# The issue is the Python drainer with O_NONBLOCK might not be reading fast enough.

# Let me check if the pipe is getting blocked again
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=1101105

echo "=== Syscall check $(date) ==="
echo "OpenROAD:"
cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "OpenROAD CPU time:"
ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null
sleep 3
ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "Pipe log bytes:"
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
echo ""
echo "Latest pipe content:"
tail -10 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
` executed with exit code 0.
